scripts.dev: bash ./scripts/free-dev-ports.sh && concurrently -n "API,WEB,PLAYGROUND" -c "blue,green,magenta" "npm run dev --workspace=apps/api" "npm run dev --workspace=apps/web" "npm run playground"
scripts.start: npm run build && npm run start:prod
scripts.start:prod: NODE_ENV=production concurrently "npm run start --workspace=apps/api" "npm run preview --workspace=apps/web"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=apps/web && npm run build --workspace=apps/api
scripts.build:web:seo: node scripts/generate-sitemap.mjs && npm run build --workspace=apps/web && node scripts/prerender.mjs
scripts.playground: concurrently -n "EXEC,PLAYGROUND" -c "cyan,magenta" "cd apps/playground && node execute-server.js" "npm run dev --workspace=apps/playground"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n "API,WEB,PLAYGROUND" -c "blue,green,magenta" "npm run dev --workspace=apps/api" "npm run dev --workspace=apps/web" "npm run dev --workspace=apps/playground"
scripts.build:all: npm run build --workspace=apps/web && npm run build --workspace=apps/api && npm run build --workspace=apps/playground
scripts.test:stability: node --import tsx --test apps/api/src/quiz/*.test.ts apps/api/src/routes/*.test.ts apps/api/src/utils/*.test.ts apps/web/tests/*.test.ts
scripts.setup: npm install && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
